criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores (e.g., Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads or installs from app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration for features like budgeting, savings, and investment advice.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analyses

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and depth of features offered, such as budget tracking, investment options, bill reminders, etc.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analyses

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use, design, and overall user experience.

criteria.name: Security and Privacy
criteria.description: Strength of security measures and privacy policies.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, privacy policies, security audits

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support.

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and improvements.
criteria.sources: App store update history, developer blogs
